events.name: DeBuck's Tulip Festival
events.time: Wed-Fri 12:00 PM-8:00 PM, Sat-Sun 10:00 AM-8:00 PM
events.location: DeBuck's Family Farm, 50240 Martz Road, Belleville, MI 48111
events.description: Public Facebook access was limited during this check, but the event page remained publicly reachable enough to recover the event title and URL. DeBuck's current festival materials list April 17-26 hours, 10 acres of tulips, rides, photo ops, and food.

events.name: Blake's 2nd Annual Tulip Festival
events.time: Mon-Thu rides start 11:00 AM and run until 4:00 PM, Fri-Sun rides start 8:00 AM and run until 5:00 PM
events.location: Blake's Orchard & Cider Mill, 17985 Armada Center Road, Armada, MI 48005
events.description: I could not recover a current public Facebook event URL from this environment during the check. Blake Farms' current event materials list the 2026 tulip festival starting April 25 with train rides to the fields, seasonal drinks, and orchard photo spots.
